Class HeuristicDetector

java.lang.Object
com.semanticprivacyguard.detector.HeuristicDetector
All Implemented Interfaces:
PIIDetector
public final class HeuristicDetector extends Object implements PIIDetector
Layer 1 detector — pattern-based heuristics using the compiled regexes in RegexPatterns.

The detector is entirely stateless and therefore inherently thread-safe. Detection order mirrors sensitivity: highest-impact types (SSN, credit card) are checked first so they can be removed before the ML layer re-scans for subtler signals.

Post-match validation

  • Credit cards are subject to Luhn checksum validation.
  • Phone numbers require exactly 10 significant digits.
  • API keys below a Shannon entropy threshold are discarded.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Hemant Naik

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    HeuristicDetector()
    Creates a detector that checks all PII types.

    Creates a detector that checks only the specified types.

  • Method Details

    • name

      public String name()
      Description copied from interface: PIIDetector
      Returns a short human-readable name used in logging and metrics (e.g. "HeuristicDetector", "NaiveBayesMLDetector").
      Specified by:
      name in interface PIIDetector

    • detect

      public List<PIIMatch> detect(String text)
      Description copied from interface: PIIDetector
      Scans the supplied text and returns every PII span detected.

      Matches may overlap; callers (typically CompositeDetector) are responsible for de-duplication.

      Specified by:
      detect in interface PIIDetector
      Parameters:
      text - the text to scan (never null)
      Returns:
      mutable list of detected spans; empty if none found
